name: Fruit-Filled Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease bottom of 12 medium muffin tins, or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, stir together milk, oil, and egg until blended.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients (except fruit preserves and glaze) until just moistened.
5. Divide batter among the prepared cups.
6. Drop 1 level teaspoonful of fruit preserves into the center of each cup.
7. Bake for 13-18 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Allow muffins to cool slightly, then remove from the pan.
9. In a small bowl, stir together sugar and water until smooth.
10. Drizzle glaze over the cooled muffins.
